title: Pedagogical Design vs Commercial Design
description: Contrasts the GP Engine's design philosophy (maximally readable, single-threaded where clarity is preserved, annotated with learning intent) against the design philosophy of commercial engines (maximally performant, abstraction-heavy, team-oriented). Understanding this distinction prevents students from copy-pasting GP Engine patterns into production code without understanding their trade-offs. Students will identify three GP Engine design decisions that differ from UE5 equivalents, explain the pedagogical reason for each, and propose the production alternative.
